title: experiment.outcome.observed.v1 payload
description: Payload of the experiment.outcome.observed.v1 event — notification that experiment-attribution-service computed a Difference-in-Differences (DiD) outcome for a registered experiment over its 7-day window and reached a B-layer verdict. Mirrors domain/experiment-outcome/v1 (the internal decision record). Skill-bank consumes ONLY B-verified (b_verdict=pass) outcomes (docs/architecture/api-event-contracts.md:68; wave5-plan.md E7).
$comment: compat_class: open (event payload, ADR-0012/ADR-0024 — additive-minor; no additionalProperties:false; undeclared-key rejection is a policy-gate obligation, not schema-enforced — see wave5-plan.md 'outcome-field-gap' W4-carried obligation, closed via policy-gate/guard by w5-06/w5-12, not silently). Authority: docs/architecture/wave5-plan.md deliverables 1-4 (DiD activation, B-gate, evidence bundle), E3/E4/E5, Human decisions H3 (independent-layer definition) and H4 (outcome_layer enum spelling [discovery,citation,absorption,prominence,referral]; conversion EXCLUDED — ALG §4:212 non-scope). engine_id REQUIRED and closed to ['chatgpt-search'] — this channel is already x-saena-engine-id-required (ADR-0013 'experiment 계열' family), composed via allOf $ref to common/engine-id/v1's engine_required_payload activation fragment (NOT redeclared inline). window.clock_anchor is const 'deployment_confirmed' — the ONLY clock-start authority is deployment.confirmed.v1 (deliverable 2). B-GATE POLICY OBLIGATION (NOT schema-checkable): b_verdict=pass requires improvement in >=2 independent signal layers (ALG §3.7-5:198); an open-class payload cannot enforce '>=2 distinct outcome_layer with distinct evidence_basis_id' — that is the w5-06 b_gate guard's obligation, honestly deferred here, NOT faked in-schema. tenant_id/run_id/idempotency carried by envelope (ADR-0024(e)), not re-projected. All refs/hashes are content-addressed anchors; NO raw customer content inline (wave5-plan.md non-scope 'Raw customer query/content/secret in events'). Both raw_view and control_adjusted_view are present (ALG §11.3:674-676 reproducibility: raw+weighted both).

registration_canonical_hash.$comment: The immutable preregistration canonical hash this outcome is measured against (event/experiment-registered.canonical_hash) — binds the outcome to the exact registered design (no post-hoc re-registration).

started_at.$comment: Window start (server-anchored, derived from deployment.confirmed.v1 receive time — deliverable 2).

clock_anchor.$comment: The ONLY clock-start authority is deployment.confirmed.v1 (ALG §7.3:483). Const-pinned so no other anchor can be claimed.

deployment_confirmation_ref.$comment: Opaque reference to the deployment.confirmed.v1 signal (deployment_id) that started this window's clock.

outcome_layer.$comment: H4 enum spelling (ALG §3.5:159). 'absorption' here is a data-model outcome-layer value ONLY, NOT P1 absorption-model activation (wave5-plan.md non-scope note). Conversion is intentionally excluded.

metric_id.$comment: Metric identifier within the outcome layer (domain/experiment-registration.metric_defs[].metric_id).

evidence_basis_id.$comment: Distinct evidence-basis identifier — H3 independent-layer definition: a layer counts toward the B-gate's >=2-independent-layer requirement only with a DISTINCT evidence_basis_id (duplicate basis counted once). Enforced by the w5-06 b_gate guard, not this schema.

treatment_raw_delta.$comment: Raw pre/post delta on the treatment arm for this metric.

control_raw_delta.$comment: Raw pre/post delta on the control arm (common-trend subtraction basis).

net_of_control_lift.$comment: DiD estimate: treatment delta net of control delta (deterministic DiD, w5-05).

insufficient.$comment: True when sample counts / data quality are below the threshold to trust this layer's estimate — contributes to an UNDETERMINED verdict rather than pass/fail (E4).

per_signal_results.$comment: Per-signal-layer DiD results. B-gate PASS policy (>=2 independent layers) is applied over this array by the w5-06 guard, not by this schema.

b_verdict.$comment: B-layer decision. pass = >=2 independent layers improved (policy-gate obligation, not schema-checkable); undetermined = insufficient/contaminated/late (E4).

reason_codes.$comment: OPTIONAL open string array of typed reason codes (H7 code-level enum v1; snake_case), esp. for fail/undetermined verdicts. Open vocabulary at schema level (pattern-constrained); the canonical code set is a w5-06 reason_codes obligation.

raw_view.$comment: Raw (un-control-adjusted) view of the outcome — MUST be present alongside control_adjusted_view (ALG §11.3:674-676 raw+weighted reproducibility). Interior open by design (per-metric raw figures); no additionalProperties:false so it can carry layer-specific raw fields.

control_adjusted_view.$comment: Control-adjusted (net-of-control) view — MUST be present alongside raw_view. Interior open by design.

manifest_hash.$comment: Hash of the domain/evidence-bundle-manifest/v1 this outcome is backed by (E5 tamper-evidence anchor).

artifact_ref.$comment: Content-addressed reference to the stored evidence bundle artifact — ref ONLY, no raw customer content inline.

version.$comment: GRS (guaranteed-result-standard) policy bundle version applied (mechanism only; production policy values BLOCKED(human) — wave5-plan.md H1).

hash.$comment: Hash of the signed GRS policy bundle used (fail-closed: unsigned/missing policy => UNDETERMINED, w5-07).

provenance.$comment: Distinguishes a real production GRS policy from a TEST-ONLY fixture (E6) — a test_fixture provenance must never be mistaken for a production determination.
